calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-22-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of an Adult and of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Beldon Yee.
Petitioner: San San Zin, present in pro per for self and as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Phyo Koko Thaw.
Co-Petitioner/Minor's Father: Thaw Zin, also present, consented and signed the Petition for a Name Change of the Minor.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Rosie Zin, and grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Bryan Zin.
Decree signed in open court.
